title: SPECTROCHEMICAL ANALYSIS OF COPPER AND CADMIUM IN THE PRECIPITATES OF CADMIUM AND COPPER  QUINALDINATES
author: A. K. MAJUMDAR
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Following the method of Nitchie, quantitative spectral analyses of Cd and Cu, adsorbed in the precipitates of Cu and Cd respectively, have been made.
steps_raw: Following the method of Nitchie, quantitative spectral analyses of Cd and Cu, adsorbed in the precipitates of Cu and Cd respectively, have been made.
